item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.97,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"周一巡检空调，周二清理水槽，周三校准门禁；今天安排下一次消防检查，请列一个值班表。"}],"abstain_reason":"No prior repeated local repairs or same-class recurrence are present; the turn only requests a duty schedule."}
